fork_tagline: An AI-assisted workbench for genre-fiction plotters
fork_purpose: Private GPL-3 fork of novelWriter retargeted at plotters with AI rewrite + consistency-check features

baseline.note: novelWriter 26.2 Alpha 0; merge of release fixes (#2733)

rebase_strategy.policy: merge upstream main quarterly; pin to a tagged release before each fork v* release
rebase_strategy.conflict_resolution: fork-specific code lives in novelwriter/ai/ and tests/test_ai/ to minimize merge conflicts; conflicts in shared files (__init__.py, config.py, statusbar.py, dialogs/preferences.py, README.md, CREDITS.md) get manual resolution per-merge.
